subcodes.title: Words spoken at Saint George church, 1911-09-17
subcodes.first_line: O respected persons! Know that prophethood is a mirror that reflects the divine effluence and the celestial effulgence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المحترمون اعلموا ان الانبیاء مرایاء تنبی عن الفیض الالهی و التجلی الرحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @man is the sum; pinnacle; fruit of creation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the mind over nature, @Manifestation of God as mirror
